Localization.Description: An attempt to create a user

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} created user {object.account.name} in database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} could not create user {object.account.name} in database "{datafield2}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
